hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.venv/|/tests/|conftest\.py|\.pytest_cache/|\.egg-info/)'; then cd /opt/domarc-smtp-relay-admin && .venv/bin/python -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -10; fi
